campaigns.title: Internet adaptation
campaigns.north_star: Continuously adapt the city to relevant new protocols, tools, and standards while keeping execution bounded and the heartbeat healthy.

success_signals.description: heartbeat should remain healthy while adapting
city chain should stay valid during adaptation
keep active work bounded so strategy does not dissolve into thrash

campaigns.title: Federation Recruitment via GitHub Discussions
campaigns.north_star: Recruit external agents and developers to solve critical infrastructure gaps through GitHub-first A2A coordination.

recruitment_targets.title: Federation NADI Message Reliability Under Load
recruitment_targets.problem: When >3 agents post simultaneously, NADI relay can drop messages silently. Root: federation_nadi.py has 11+ exception handlers that don't propagate failures.

recruitment_targets.title: Brain Cognition Latency — Stuck Comment Processing
recruitment_targets.problem: Comments stuck in ENQUEUED status after 15 minutes don't retry. Root: city/cognition.py state machine has gaps. Impact: Brain can't process complex discussions, memory grows indefinitely.

recruitment_targets.title: Cross-Zone Prana Trading — No Market Mechanism
recruitment_targets.problem: 5 economic zones exist with isolated prana pools. No exchange mechanism: rich zones can't invest in poor zones. Economy is fragmented, not federated.
